raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is reachable by the right arm and there is unobstructed side access to apply a steadying contact without colliding with cup_1; the tabletop area around the box pair is stable enough to resist sliding.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is laterally constrained by the right end-effector, reducing motion of the attached box pair during the upcoming grasp of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left arm can access the left and right faces of box_1 without interference; box_2 remains stabilized to counteract forces due to the attachment between box_1 and box_2; cup_1 is not in the left arm sweep path.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector and lifted/controlled off the table, with box_2 prevented from shifting abruptly despite the attachment."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is already controlled by the left end-effector and there is no risk of box_2 tipping or dragging cup_1 during release of the stabilizing contact.",
    "Postcondition": "The right end-effector disengages; box_1 remains picked up and controlled by the left arm, completing the pick-up of the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is reachable by the right arm and there is unobstructed side access to apply a steadying contact without colliding with cup_1; the tabletop area around the box pair is stable enough to resist sliding.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is laterally constrained by the right end-effector, reducing motion of the attached box pair during the upcoming grasp of box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: The left arm can access the left and right faces of box_1 without interference; box_2 remains stabilized to counteract forces due to the attachment between box_1 and box_2; cup_1 is not in the left arm sweep path.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector and lifted/controlled off the table, with box_2 prevented from shifting abruptly despite the attachment.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is already controlled by the left end-effector and there is no risk of box_2 tipping or dragging cup_1 during release of the stabilizing contact.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The right end-effector disengages; box_1 remains picked up and controlled by the left arm, completing the pick-up of the darker box.
